description: These are quotes or comments that I have heard or come across in reading that I find to be very clear and useful.

microservices.quote: The huge monolith is not an architecture style. It is usually a mistake.... and it probably has a lot to do with product pressures
microservices.author: Sleepless Dev

microservices.quote: ... If their [monolithic] application is a big ball of spaghetti code, then that has nothing to do with lack of microservices or them trying to develop a monolithic [application], their process, training and culture are the issue.
microservices.author: Sleepless Dev
